creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm happy to see the developments around this patch.

To get this into ports, I'd really like to see an upstream submission
first (by the author(s) if possible, and someone with an FSF copyright
assignment ideally).  I volunteer, and you can mention that in the
submission, to commit the patch once approved.

If you have any questions how to best go about it, Andreas Tobler and
me should be able to help.

In any case, can this please target the latest version of lang/gcc*,
i.e. lang/gcc5 right now?  Doing this for a GCC 4.8 based compiler
automatically introduces a regression with GCC 4.9 and GCC 5 based
compilers.

(In the case of aarch64, my recommendation is to default to lang/gcc5
or lang/gcc49 instead of lang/gcc for USE_GCC=yes / USE_GCC=any given
how things have evolved since GCC 4.8.)
